prompt_text: Open source or affordable HR tools instead of HiBob
response:
# Open Source & Affordable HR Tools vs HiBob

## Open Source Options

### **OpenHRM**
- Fully open source, self-hosted
- Employee records, leave management, recruitment
- Good for small teams with technical resources

### **OrangeHRM**
- Open source + commercial versions
- Core modules: employee management, recruitment, leave, attendance
- Community support; paid hosting available

### **Frappe HR**
- Part of the ERPNext ecosystem
- Employee records, leave, attendance, performance management
- Self-hosted; good for startups

---

## Affordable/Budget Alternatives

### **Low-Cost Options ($50-200/month)**
- **Personio** — streamlined HRIS, focused feature set
- **Workable** — strong on recruitment, lighter on HR
- **Paychex Flex** — integrated payroll + HR
- **Guidepoint** — employee self-service, affordable

### **Micro-Business Options (<$50/month)**
- **Zenefits** — free version available (limited)
- **Deputy** — shift scheduling + HR basics
- **Square Payroll** — minimal but functional
- **Gusto** — payroll-first but includes HR starter features

### **Spreadsheet/Freemium Hybrid**
- **Google Workspace + Forms** — DIY approach
- **Airtable** — customizable databases for HR workflows
- **Monday.com** — flexible project/HR management

---

## Quick Comparison to HiBob

| Feature | HiBob | Alternatives |
|---------|-------|--------------|
| **Price** | $$$$ (~$15/emp) | $-$$ (~$3-8/emp) |
| **Ease** | Very high | Medium-High |
| **Customization** | Limited | High (esp. open source) |
| **Team Size** | 50+ | Any size |

**Best for:** Need more details on your team size and priorities?
